name: @upsetjs/bundle

en.when_to_use: Use it for intersection analysis of four or more sets (feature/permission overlap, tag co-occurrence, multi-select surveys, gene-set overlap): an UpSet combination matrix aligned with intersection-size bars. Feed sets plus elements; @upsetjs/bundle is the vanilla (non-React) build. Use it instead of a Venn/Euler diagram when there are more than three sets.
en.why_valuable: An UpSet plot is the standard notation for multi-set intersections--a combination matrix coordinated with intersection-size and set-size bars. Native AI cannot assemble it reliably (combination enumeration plus matrix/bar alignment), and it is a named notation rather than an ordinary bar chart.

data_in.note: Two input methods: (a) each element has sets:string[], and extractCombinations(elements) produces {sets, combinations}; (b) build ISet[]+ISetCombination[] yourself. width/height in render props are required px values. License is AGPL-3.0 or a commercial dual license (strong copyleft); take care in SaaS scenarios.

elements.sets: string[] -- names of sets containing this element (for extractCombinations)

schema.sets?: ISet[] -- alternatively provide { name, elems[] }[] directly (choose this or elements)
schema.combinations?: ISetCombination[] -- provide when building manually; otherwise produced by extractCombinations

spec.note: render width/height are props in px, not container height; SVG draws at the prop dimensions and the container is only a host. vh/percentage height is prohibited.

when_to_use: 4 个以上集合的交集分析(feature/权限重叠、标签共现、多选问卷、gene-set 重叠):UpSet 组合点阵与 intersection-size 柱状对齐。喂 sets + elements;@upsetjs/bundle 是 vanilla(无 React)构建。集合超过 3 个时用它取代 Venn/Euler 图。
why_valuable: UpSet plot 是多集合交集的标准 notation——组合点阵与 intersection-size、set-size 柱状协同——原生 AI 无法可靠手搭(组合枚举 + 点阵与柱图对齐),且它是有名字的 notation 而非普通柱状图。

data_in.note: 两种喂法:(a) 每个 element 带 sets:string[] → extractCombinations(elements) 得 {sets, combinations};(b) 自建 ISet[]+ISetCombination[]。render props 的 width/height 是必填 px。⚠️ license 为 AGPL-3.0 或商业双授权(强 copyleft),SaaS 场景注意。

elements.sets: string[] —— 该元素所属集合名(供 extractCombinations)

schema.sets?: ISet[] —— 也可直接给 { name, elems[] }[](与 elements 二选一)
schema.combinations?: ISetCombination[] —— 自建时给,否则由 extractCombinations 产出

spec.note: render 的 width/height 是 props(px)不是容器高;SVG 按 props 尺寸绘制,容器仅作宿主,禁 vh/百分比高。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:ESM namespace + render 画 SVG 进 node
carriers.widget: supported:render 把 SVG 子树 + 内联样式画进传入的 node,无 document.head 注入
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,纯 SVG 渲染,无 worker/wasm/uplink

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr @upsetjs/bundle@1.11.0 +esm: named exports present (yc as render, vc as renderUpSet, So as extractCombinations, sr as extractSets, se as generateCombinations, Be as getDefaultTheme). dist/index.d.ts: `declare function render<T>(node: HTMLElement, props: UpSetProps<T>): void` (L1913); UpSetProps requires sets (UpSetBaseDataProps) + width/height:number (UpSetBaseLayoutProps L1064/1068); extractCombinations single-arg overload for elements with `sets:string[]` (L321). README: `import * as UpSetJS`, `const {sets,combinations}=UpSetJS.extractCombinations(elems)`, `UpSetJS.render(node,{sets,combinations,width,height})`. +esm DOM grep: appendChild only + createElementNS x1 (SVG), NO document.head / insertRule / adoptedStyleSheets / document.styleSheets → renders an SVG subtree into the passed node with inline styles → shadow-safe. License note: package.json 'SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE.md'; LICENSE.md = dual AGPL-3.0 (open-source) OR commercial. confidence high.
